title: Flower Up Lokta Paper
description: If your mum’s the outdoorsy type, wrap up a floral Lush treat inside this Lokta paper adorned in flowers this Mother's Day, so they can power up with petals!

images.alt: Flower Up. A vibrant, square sheet of Lokta paper features a soft, impressionist floral design. Large, watercolour blooms in shades of pink, purple, and pale lilac are scattered across a light blue background.

The image shows a hand holding a tied, "Flower Up" Lokta paper wrapped around a gift. The vibrant material, with hand-painted flowers in pink, purple, and blue on a lime-green background, is being secured over a gift on a pale green tiled surface.
The image shows a model with short, curled auburn hair, in a white bathrobe. They are smelling the bath bomb wrapped within the colourful "Flower Up" Lokta paper, on a bright, tiled background.
A vibrant close-up shows a sheet of the "Flower Up" Lokta paper, featuring a hand-painted floral design with light and dark pink flowers with yellow centres, and large, lush green leaves.
